en: Full account settings and profile editing are not implemented yet.
zh: 完整账户设置和资料编辑尚未实现。

en: No avatar upload is available yet.
Supabase environment variables are not configured yet.
zh: Supabase 环境变量尚未配置。

en: A minimal read-only account profile placeholder. Full profile editing is not implemented yet.
zh: 一个最小的只读账户资料占位页。完整资料编辑尚未实现。

en: Account settings are a placeholder for now. Theme and language preferences stay in the header and are stored in this browser.
zh: 账户设置暂时是占位页。主题和语言偏好仍放在页头，并保存在此浏览器中。

en: Log in with your email and password. This page is intentionally simple and only covers the base auth flow.
zh: 使用邮箱和密码登录。此页面保持简单，只覆盖基础认证流程。

en: Password must be at least 6 characters.
zh: 密码至少需要 6 个字符。

en: Create an account with an email address and password. No profile setup or business data is added at this stage.
zh: 使用邮箱和密码创建账户。当前阶段不会添加资料设置或业务数据。

en: Account created. If email confirmation is enabled in Supabase, check your inbox before logging in.
zh: 账户已创建。如果 Supabase 启用了邮箱确认，请先查看收件箱再登录。

en: Choose one custom list. Existing list memberships are kept.
zh: 选择一个自定义列表。现有列表归属会保留。

en: Create another custom list before using this batch action.
zh: 请先创建另一个自定义列表，再使用此批量操作。

en: Create custom lists from the sidebar or a title detail page.
zh: 可在侧栏或标题详情页创建自定义列表。

en: Move is available inside a custom list
zh: 移动操作仅在自定义列表中可用

en: Choose a destination list. Titles are removed from the current custom list only.
zh: 选择目标列表。条目只会从当前自定义列表中移除。

en: Choose a system collection. Custom-list memberships are kept.
zh: 选择一个系统集合。自定义列表归属会保留。

en: Removes your saved status, rating, review, and custom-list assignments for this title.
zh: 会移除此标题的保存状态、评分、短评和自定义列表分配。

en: Removes this title from the current custom list only. Your saved status, rating, review, progress, and other list memberships are kept.
zh: 只会从当前自定义列表中移除此条目。已保存的状态、评分、短评、进度和其他列表归属会保留。

en: Titles you want to start later.
Search TMDB movies and TV shows, then track them in your list.
zh: 搜索 TMDB 电影和剧集，并把它们加入你的片单。

en: Search TMDB for movies and TV shows, save titles to a protected collection, and organize progress with statuses, custom lists, ratings, and reviews.
zh: 搜索 TMDB 的电影和剧集，把条目保存到受保护的个人片单，并用状态、自定义列表、评分和短评整理进度。

en: Review saved titles by status, custom list, rating, review, and TV episode progress.
zh: 按状态、自定义列表、评分、短评和剧集进度查看已保存内容。

en: Add titles as Want to Watch, Watching, or Completed from their detail pages.
zh: 在详情页把条目标记为想看、在看或已看完。

en: Find movies and TV shows, then open a result to view its title details.
zh: 查找电影和剧集，打开结果即可查看标题详情。

en: Track what you watch without the clutter.
zh: 轻松追踪你的观看记录，告别杂乱无章

en: Remove this custom list? Titles stay in your main list.
zh: 删除此自定义列表？标题仍会保留在你的主片单中。

en: Browse status collections and user-created custom lists in a compact collection hub.
zh: 在一个紧凑的片单中心浏览系统状态集合和用户自定义列表。

en: Search for a movie or TV title, open its detail page, and choose a watch status to start building your list.
zh: 搜索电影或剧集，打开详情页并选择观看状态，就可以开始构建片单。

en: Add or assign saved titles from their title detail pages.
zh: 可以在标题详情页添加或分配已保存条目。
更多列表操作即将加入

en: Supabase environment variables are not configured yet. Add them before testing the protected page.
zh: Supabase 环境变量尚未配置。请先配置后再测试受保护页面。

en: Placeholder for a future subscribed-lists feature.
zh: 这里预留给未来的订阅列表功能。

en: Find movies and TV titles from TMDB, then open a result to add it to your list.
zh: 从 TMDB 查找电影和剧集，打开结果后即可加入你的片单。

en: Enter a title to search TMDB for movies and TV shows.
zh: 输入标题即可在 TMDB 中搜索电影和剧集。

en: [FUNCTION] (max: number) =>\n        `Search query must be ${max} characters or fewer.`
zh: [FUNCTION] (max: number) => `搜索关键词不能超过 ${max} 个字符。`

en: Try a different movie or TV title.
zh: 试试其他电影或剧集标题。

en: [FUNCTION] (theme: string) =>\n        `Theme preference: ${theme}. Click to cycle Light, Dark, System.`
zh: [FUNCTION] (theme: string) =>\n        `当前主题偏好：${theme}。点击切换浅色、深色、跟随系统。`

en: Add a short note about this title.
zh: 写一点你对这个标题的想法。

en: User-created lists only. Status collections stay virtual.
zh: 仅包含用户创建的列表。系统状态集合保持为虚拟集合。

en: Ratings, reviews, and episode progress are available after moving this title to Watching or Completed.
zh: 把此标题移动到在看或已看完后，可以填写评分、短评和剧集进度。

en: The title could not be loaded from TMDB.
zh: 无法从 TMDB 加载此标题。

en: Save this title before adding it to custom lists.
zh: 请先保存此标题，再加入自定义列表。
